svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="0HcztlhuCpI8Zi9Trzo0"> <mxGraphModel dx="1153" dy="767" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#A5A5A5,#A5A5A5);fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;strokeWidth=4;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;" value="<div style="text-align: justify;"><b>CorrelationIdMiddleware</b></div><div style="text-align: justify;">- Adds X-Correlation-ID header (auto-generates UUID)</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- Stores ID in context variable for logs</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="300" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#A5A5A5,#A5A5A5);fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;strokeWidth=4;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;" value="<div style="text-align: justify;"><b>GZipMiddleware</b></div><div style="text-align: justify;">- Compresses responses &gt;1KB (if enabled)</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- Saves bandwidth for SSE streams</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="300" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#A5A5A5,#A5A5A5);fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;strokeWidth=4;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;" value="<div style="text-align: justify;"><b>RateLimitMiddleware</b></div><div style="text-align: justify;">- Token bucket per client IP (default 1000 req/min)</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- Exempts /health and /api/v1/stats</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- Returns `429 (Too Many Requests)` if exceeded</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="300" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#A5A5A5,#A5A5A5);fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;strokeWidth=4;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;" value="<div style="text-align: justify;"><b>CORSMiddleware</b></div><div style="text-align: justify;">- Adds Access-Control-* headers</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- Configurable allowed origins (default *)</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- Handles preflight OPTIONS requests</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="300" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
